message:
beads: sync issue journal with non-contiguous journal, WAL rollback, and benchmark work

Update .beads/issues.jsonl to reflect the current state of the issue
tracker after the session's code, script, and benchmark changes. This
includes status transitions and comment history for issues related to
ext4 journal non-contiguous extent support, MVCC WAL durability
hardening, benchmark pipeline improvements, and performance baseline
recording.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
